scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.stop: pkill -f "tsx watch" || true && pkill -f "next dev" || true && lsof -ti:5050 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true && lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true && lsof -ti:5051 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true && lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.clean-ports: lsof -ti:5050 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true && lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true && lsof -ti:5051 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true && lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.restart: npm run stop && npm run clean-ports && npm run dev
